title: DrMap
description: Import images into empty maps from online links.
body:
# DrMap DrMap allows you to import images into empty maps.

## Commands and Permissions
Command Description Permission
/drmap create [params]
ex. /drmap create https://i.imgur.com/URVT1ul.png height:2 width:3		 Creates a new map from a url drmap.command.create
/drmap info Provides information about a DrMap drmap.command.info
/drmap erase Turns a DrMap back into an empty map drmap.command.erase
/drmap reload Reloads the plugin config drmap.command.reload
Place DrMaps into item frames drmap.place
Enables you to quick-place all parts of a large image by just placing 1. This will respect GriefPrevention and Worldguard but may not respect other claiming plugins. drmap.place.magic
Rotate DrMaps in item frames drmap.rotate
Manipulate DrMaps in cartography tables drmap.cartography
## What types of images work? DrMap is meant to be used with pngs and jpegs. If an image isn't working for you, try uploading the image to Imgur. Then, right-click the image and select copy image address. This is the URL you want to use for your create command. I've also found that you can also send the image in a Discord channel, then click "open original" and use that URL. ## FAQ ### Does this work on the latest version? Yes. It sometimes takes me some time before I update the Modrinth page to reflect that it works in the latest version, but it should still work. ### Color codes don't work Servers using a Bukkit instance without Adventure (i.e. Spigot servers, but not Paper servers) will fallback to using legacy color codes. However, as of v1.1.0, the lang file is generated assuming Minimessage availability. Affected server owners will need to update the lang file to get their colors to translate. ## Usage Stats See more stats here.
